revision.text:
[[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]] [[Category:Tier 3 Categories]][[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[ja:Category:18世紀日本の歴史家]] [[ar:Category:مؤرخون يابانيون في القرن 18]] [[fr:Category:Historien japonais du XVIIIe siècle]]
This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[Arai Hakuseki]].

revision.comment: Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q100147987)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text: <!--templates--> {{wikidata link|Q100147987}} <!--interwikis--> [[ja:Category:18世紀日本の歴史家]] [[ar:Category:مؤرخون يابانيون في القرن 18]] [[fr:Category:Historien japonais du XVIIIe siècle]] <!--categories--> [[Category:Tier 3 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=18th-century_Japanese_historians here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive.
